changelog:
🐛 Update dialog no longer reappears after dismissal for the same version.
🔒 Offline privacy info shown as a one-time dialog when entering offline mode.
☁️ Backup prompt only appears when you actually have offline notes to back up.
🔄 Automatic sync now runs periodically (every 30 min) instead of on every reconnect.
📱 Welcome screen now scrolls on smaller devices.
